Summary

Passionate self-taught developer specialising in full-stack web and mobile app development using modern AI-assisted (vibe coding) workflows. I build educational and productivity tools designed for Sri Lankan communities — from exam paper platforms to cross-platform desktop apps — combining clean UI, fast backends, and practical AI integration.

Mathematics Teacher

Teaching mathematics to secondary and A/L students. Developing structured lesson plans and practice materials to improve student outcomes.
